ogTitle: Tabulam vs Tacoma South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tabulam and Tacoma South.
heading: Tabulam vs Tacoma South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tabulam, New South Wales and Tacoma South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tabulam has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Tacoma South (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tabulam or Tacoma South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tabulam has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Tacoma South scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tabulam scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Tacoma South scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tabulam or Tacoma South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tabulam has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
